# kalandra.tech

> Pavel Kalandra — CTO & Software Engineering Leader. Personal showcase built in public.

This is a personal portfolio and technology showcase website for Pavel Kalandra, a CTO and software engineering leader based in the Czech Republic.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.kalandra.tech/): Overview of the site, navigation to key sections
- [About Me](https://www.kalandra.tech/about): Background, experience, and skills
- [Project](https://www.kalandra.tech/project): Technical deep-dive into how this site is built — architecture, tech stack, and engineering decisions
- [Hire Me](https://www.kalandra.tech/hire-me): Contact form for job offers and collaboration inquiries
- [Job Offers](https://www.kalandra.tech/job-offers): Public listing of received job offers (with consent)
- [MCP](https://www.kalandra.tech/mcp): Connect an AI assistant to this site over the Model Context Protocol — submit job offers, browse blog posts, read and write comments
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.kalandra.tech/privacy): Data handling and privacy information
- [Terms of Service](https://www.kalandra.tech/terms): Usage terms

## MCP Server

AI assistants can interact with this site directly over the Model Context Protocol:

- Endpoint: https://api.kalandra.tech/mcp (streamable HTTP, stateless)
- Public tools (no account): list blog posts, read blog comments
- Account tools (Supabase access token in the Authorization header): submit and track job offers, comment on job offers and blog posts, list your own comments and their replies
- Details: https://www.kalandra.tech/mcp

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: Astro (static site generation) with Tailwind CSS, deployed to Cloudflare Pages
- Backend: ASP.NET Core (.NET 10) with Marten event sourcing, deployed to Oracle Cloud
- Database: PostgreSQL via Supabase
- Auth: Supabase Auth (email/password + Google OAuth)

## Languages

Available in English (default) and Czech (/cs/ prefix).

## Contact

- Email: [pavel@kalandra.tech](mailto:pavel@kalandra.tech)
- LinkedIn: [Pavel Kalandra](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pavelkalandra/)
